testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistryTest

testcase.name: broadcast to a device with no emitters returns 0()
register alias still works for back-compat callers()
add returns the emitter for chaining()
connectionCount stays stable across many broadcasts()
getByDeviceId snapshot is decoupled from later mutations()
remove for an unknown device is a no-op()
failing emitter is removed and other emitters still receive the event()
getByDeviceId returns empty list for unknown device()
broadcast sends event to every emitter for the matching device()
remove drops only the targeted emitter()
add increments connection count for that device only()
remove on the last emitter prunes the empty device entry()
getByDeviceId returns the live emitters for that device only()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:33.929+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-1 totalEmittersForDevice=1
